items.title: Caterpillar’s AI Data Center Engine Bet Could Be A Game Changer For Caterpillar (CAT)
items.description: Caterpillar Inc. is presenting at CES 2026 in Las Vegas this week, with CEO Joseph Creed and senior technology leaders showcasing the Cat AI Nexus and other Industrial AI and autonomous worksite solutions. The company is pairing this technology push with a US$725 million investment to expand large-engine capacity for data center power, underscoring how AI-related energy demand is reshaping its business mix. We’ll now explore how Caterpillar’s large-engine investment for AI data centers may...

items.title: Caterpillar (CAT) Beats Stock Market Upswing: What Investors Need to Know
items.description: In the closing of the recent trading day, Caterpillar (CAT) stood at $616.1, denoting a +2.96% move from the preceding trading day.

items.title: Industrial Stocks Are Flying Despite Lousy Data. Here’s Why.
items.description: FEATURE  The U.S. manufacturing economy is struggling. Manufacturing stocks aren’t. That feels odd. On Monday, the Institute for Supply Management released its Purchasing Managers Index, or PMI The December reading was 47.
